title: [CI:DOCS] Add CNI deprecation notices to documentation
body:
Where the terms CNI and cni are used in documentation like man pages, readme's, and tutorials, we have begun to add deprecation notices where applicable. In cases where netavark cannot do what CNI can, those have been left alone.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
* deprecation notices for CNI added to some documentation including man pages
```
